_meta.purpose: Universal red flag thresholds for ALL sectors. AI checks user inputs and surfaces warnings.

danger.message: LTV:CAC below 1:1 — losing money on every customer acquired. Unsustainable.

warning.message: LTV:CAC below 3:1 — margins tight. Reprice or cut acquisition cost.

healthy.message: LTV:CAC at 3:1 or above — healthy unit economics.

danger.message: Gross margin under 15% — almost no room to cover fixed costs.

warning.message: Gross margin under 25% — pricing or sourcing needs work.

danger.message: Negative net margin — burning cash every month.

warning.message: Net margin under 8% — any shock will push you negative.

danger.message: Break-even beyond 3 years — rethink the financial model.

warning.message: Break-even beyond 18 months — risky for bootstrapped business.
35%+ monthly churn — leaking customers faster than acquiring.

danger.message: Top 2 clients = 70%+ of revenue. One exit kills the business.

warning.message: Top 2 clients = 50%+ of revenue. Diversify urgently.

healthy.message: No single client above 30% — healthy diversification.

danger.message: Under 1 month runway — critical. Act immediately.

warning.message: Under 3 months runway — raise capital or reduce burn now.

jordanSpecificWarnings: COD dominance: budget 10–15% of delivery orders for refusal/returns — they will not convert to cash.
B2B payment terms 30–60 days are standard — revenue month does not equal cash month.
21.4% unemployment = large talent pool, but also means low consumer spending power.
Do NOT build base-case revenue on viral social media scenarios — model it as upside only.
Seasonal spikes (Ramadan, back-to-school, summer) can distort monthly benchmarks by ±40%.
